After completing the update deployment, refresh the Web App URL for the changes to take effect. Saving files does not automatically update the online service.

ba132457e6a5.name: How does Google Offerwall ads require users to complete tasks before accessing website content?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Offerwall ads allow developers to set website content pages that require users to complete specified tasks before access is granted. Tasks include watching ads, filling out surveys, making small payments, or subscribing to newsletters. After completing the tasks, users gain access permissions, which can be set with time limits or view count restrictions. The entire process can be implemented simply by embedding the Google Adsense dynamic ad code.

ba132457e6a5.name: What are the advantages and disadvantages of Google Offerwall ads?

acceptedAnswer.text: Advantages include easy implementation by just embedding Adsense code; direct monetization without building your own ad system or finding advertisers; flexibility supporting various content monetization methods; and cross-platform support for both mobile and desktop. Disadvantages are generally low ad bids and the fact that since it uses purely front-end ad blocking, it can be easily bypassed by ad-blocking tools. Therefore, it is not recommended for sensitive or important content.

ba132457e6a5.name: How do you apply for and activate Google Offerwall ads?

acceptedAnswer.text: First, you need to apply and be approved by Google Adsense. The threshold is low; you just need a website URL with 5–10 articles. Next, embed the Adsense dynamic ad code in the <head> section of your website's HTML. Finally, create the Offerwall ad in the Adsense backend under the Privacy & Messaging management page, set the ad name, applicable website, trigger conditions, and reward content, then publish it to start using.

ba132457e6a5.name: What type of content creators or websites are suitable for Google Offerwall ads?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Offerwall is suitable for small to medium content websites or personal blogs, especially those without their own ad inventory, such as static sites hosted on Wordpress or GitHub Pages. It allows setting reward wall ads on valuable articles beyond existing ad slots, quickly converting traffic into revenue. It is also suitable for scenarios like surveys, small payments, or newsletter subscriptions.

ba132457e6a5.name: How does the reward mechanism of Google Offerwall ads work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Users receive reward access to website content after completing specified tasks such as watching ads or filling out surveys. This reward can be set to allow unlimited views within a certain time or a limited number of views. Once the reward period expires, users must complete the tasks again to continue accessing content. The entire process is managed by the Google Adsense system, requiring no self-development, enhancing user engagement and generating revenue.

ba132457e6a5.name: What is the difference between Google Offerwall ads and regular rewarded ads?

acceptedAnswer.text: Offerwall is a reward wall ad that emphasizes users completing various tasks (like filling surveys or subscribing) to unlock content, offering richer and more flexible interaction. Rewarded ads are mostly seen in games, where users watch videos or click to earn virtual currency or in-game items. Offerwall is more suitable for content website monetization, while rewarded ads focus more on enhancing in-game experiences.

ba132457e6a5.name: Why is Google Offerwall ads not recommended for sensitive or important content?

acceptedAnswer.text: Because Google Offerwall uses a purely front-end blocking method, users can easily bypass restrictions using ad-block plugins or developer tools, potentially allowing unauthorized access to sensitive or important content. Therefore, it is not recommended for high-value or sensitive information and is only suitable for general content traffic monetization.

8ace34a1a3d8.name: Is the VISIT BUSAN PASS worth buying?

acceptedAnswer.text: The VISIT BUSAN PASS is definitely worth buying as it can save you a lot on transportation and attraction entrance fees. It offers various plans, including unlimited use for a limited time and limited usage options, allowing users to choose flexibly according to their itinerary. The author of the article purchased two BIG5 passes for about NT$2,760 and redeemed multiple attractions and transportation tickets, saving money and convenience.

8ace34a1a3d8.name: What is the most convenient way to use transportation cards for free travel in Busan, South Korea?

acceptedAnswer.text: For free travel in Busan, it is recommended to use the Tmoney transportation card. iPhone users can top up Tmoney directly via Apple Wallet, or buy a physical card and preload it in Taiwan to avoid complicated procedures on site. The article also mentions that the Wowpass App can be used for top-ups, but the process is more complicated and involves fees. When taking buses, be aware of restrictions on large luggage and drinks, and for the subway, confirm the direction before entering the station.

8ace34a1a3d8.name: How to book the Y Holic yacht tour in Busan?

acceptedAnswer.text: To take the Y Holic yacht with the VISIT BUSAN PASS, you need to make a reservation first. You can contact the boat operator via Instagram, Line, Email, or WeChat, providing the number of people, date, time slot, and the pass QR code. Night sessions require an additional payment of 5,000 KRW. After a successful reservation, you must arrive 30 minutes early to line up and verify your identity before boarding the yacht.

8ace34a1a3d8.name: What is the difference between the Busan Capsule Train and the Coastal Train?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Capsule Train and the Coastal Train are different sightseeing transportation options. The Capsule Train is not included in the VISIT BUSAN PASS and requires a separate ticket; it is very popular, so booking in advance is recommended. A two-person ticket costs about NT$861. The Coastal Train can be redeemed with the pass and is suitable for travelers who want to stop at multiple scenic spots. The boarding locations and experiences differ, with the Capsule Train offering a more unique experience.

8ace34a1a3d8.name: What are the important rules to know when taking buses in Busan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Busan buses prohibit bringing luggage larger than 20 inches and handheld tumblers on board (even if not drinking). When boarding the bus, enter through the front door and exit through the rear door; card readers are usually located behind the driver's seat. Stores do not accept outside trash, so it is recommended to finish drinks at attractions or department stores before disposing of them. For groups of two or more, taking a taxi is a good option since taxis are plentiful and inexpensive in Busan.

8ace34a1a3d8.name: How to resolve a locked Busan Naver Map account?

acceptedAnswer.text: A locked Naver Map account is often triggered by overseas or unusual login locations activating security protection. To unlock, submit identity verification documents through the official application form, such as the passport personal information page and registration details. Upon successful application, you will receive a temporary password. It is recommended to change your password and enable two-factor authentication after logging in. The official response is usually quick, often resolving the issue within half a day.

8ace34a1a3d8.name: What are the must-try foods in Busan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Must-try foods in Busan include grilled eel (PUNGCHEONMAN) and salt bread (Jayeondo saltbread) in the northern district, throat pot lid barbecue (Moggumung Nampo Branch), and red bean cream mugwort rice cake (Milgot) in the southern district. The grilled eel is crispy and juicy, the salt bread is fragrant, crispy, and slightly salty, and the pot lid barbecue offers good quality meat at affordable prices. These are all popular local delicacies.

8ace34a1a3d8.name: Where to stay in Busan for convenient transportation and reasonable prices during free travel?

acceptedAnswer.text: Recommended accommodations for free travel in Busan include Haeundae Korea Good Night Hotel (about NT$2,000 per night per person, approximately a 10-minute walk to Haeundae main street), Hotel Noah (about NT$1,298 per night per person, near Jagalchi Station and BIFF Square), and Air Sky Hotel near the airport (about NT$1,418 per night per person, about a 10-minute subway ride one station from the airport). These hotels offer convenient transportation and reasonable prices.

e4d139fe0685.name: What is the fee for depositing to Firstrade via LINE Bank?

acceptedAnswer.text: The discounted remittance fee for depositing to Firstrade via LINE Bank is NT$150 per transaction, originally priced at NT$600. This promotional offer lasts until June 30, 2026, and there are no telegram fees or other additional charges. The fee rate decreases as the remittance amount increases; for example, a NT$50,000 remittance has a fee rate of about 0.3%.

e4d139fe0685.name: How do I link a Firstrade designated account in LINE Bank?

acceptedAnswer.text: To link a Firstrade designated account, you must first complete Natural Person Certificate verification and customer service video verification. The Natural Person Certificate must be a TP07 card with an NFC chip. After verification, open the LINE Bank App, go to "More" → "Foreign Exchange" → "Remittance Designated Account" to add a designated account. Enter the Firstrade remittance information and pass SMS two-factor authentication. The designated account will take 2 days to become effective.

e4d139fe0685.name: How do I apply for Firstrade's remittance fee subsidy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Firstrade's remittance fee subsidy applies to single deposits over US$10,000, with a subsidy cap of US$25 and a maximum of 3 applications per month. To apply, log in to Firstrade within 30 days after remittance, go to "Customer Service" → "Special Offers" → "Remittance Fee Subsidy", select the remittance details and submit. The subsidy will be received within about 2 to 3 business days.

e4d139fe0685.name: How long does it take for a LINE Bank remittance to Firstrade to arrive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The remittance usually arrives in the Firstrade account within about 2 days, provided the designated account is linked or the remittance amount is below NT$50,000. After LINE Bank shows that the beneficiary bank has received the funds, Firstrade still needs to process during U.S. business hours, and confirmation and crediting usually occur the next day.

e4d139fe0685.name: What is the difference between upgrading a LINE Bank account and a designated account?

acceptedAnswer.text: A basic account limits single remittances to NT$10,000. Upgraded accounts (with video verification) can increase the limit to NT$50,000 per transaction and NT$100,000 daily. Designated accounts require both Natural Person Certificate and video verification, allowing a single remittance up to NT$500,000. Designated accounts are suitable for large remittances and enable fast and secure transfers.

e4d139fe0685.name: Why does LINE Bank require a Natural Person Certificate for designated accounts?

acceptedAnswer.text: LINE Bank has no physical branches, so designated accounts require a Natural Person Certificate to verify identity and ensure remittance security. The Natural Person Certificate must be a TP07 card with an NFC chip, which must be personally applied for at the Household Registration Office at a cost of NT$250. After obtaining it, you can complete the designated account linking in the app.

e4d139fe0685.name: Why must the Firstrade account name match the passport name?

acceptedAnswer.text: Firstrade requires the account name to match the passport name because U.S. stock brokers must comply with international anti-money laundering and identity verification regulations to ensure the legality of funds and transactions. Using the passport name helps avoid issues during subsequent identity verification.

958599363857.name: What time does the Atami Fireworks Festival start, and how long does it last?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Atami Fireworks Festival in July and August is held from 8:15 PM to 8:40 PM, lasting 25 minutes; in other months, it runs from 8:20 PM to 8:40 PM, lasting 20 minutes. On September 15, 2025, the fireworks will be from 8:20 PM to 8:40 PM, lasting 20 minutes.

958599363857.name: How can I conveniently purchase Shinkansen tickets from Tokyo to Atami in advance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Shinkansen tickets from Tokyo to Atami can be purchased in advance on the JR official website or platforms like KKday and Klook. Tickets go on sale at 11 PM Taiwan time and can be bought up to 4 weeks ahead. E-tickets do not require exchanging for physical tickets; you can enter the station directly using the QR code on your phone, which is very convenient.

958599363857.name: What transportation does the Kawagoe Pass include, and how is it most conveniently used?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Kawagoe Pass includes round-trip rides on the Tobu Tojo Line train between Ikebukuro and Kawagoe stations, as well as unlimited all-day rides on Tobu buses (including the Tobu Koedo Loop Bus). To use it, simply activate it online and show the QR code to the driver when boarding; no separate exchange is needed. Avoid using a Suica card when boarding.

958599363857.name: How can I buy Shibuya Sky tickets to avoid missing out?

acceptedAnswer.text: Shibuya Sky tickets are very popular, so it is recommended to purchase them in advance via the official website or KKday. Tickets go on sale on the official site at 11 PM Taiwan time for entry two weeks later. You need to register as a member and familiarize yourself with the process before buying. You can enter a nickname as the ticket name. Different time slots are available, such as the 6:40 PM night view session.

958599363857.name: Where at Tokyo airports can I buy Le Labo perfumes cheaper than in the city?

acceptedAnswer.text: Le Labo perfumes at Narita Airport duty-free shops are cheaper than tax-refunded prices in Japanese city stores. For example, a 50ml perfume costs about NT$5,200 at the airport, around NT$5,700 in the city, and about NT$5,500 at Taiwan airport duty-free shops. It is recommended to purchase at the airport duty-free shops after departure for better deals.

958599363857.name: What essential items and precautions should I have at the Atami Fireworks Festival site?

acceptedAnswer.text: Admission to the Atami Fireworks Festival site is free with no paid seating. It is recommended to bring a picnic mat for comfortable seating on the beach. There are shared restrooms and shower facilities nearby, though some are somewhat old. Booking JR tickets or accommodation in advance can help avoid crowded transportation.

958599363857.name: How is the interactive experience at the Otter Café HARRY Harajuku branch, and is it worth visiting?

acceptedAnswer.text: The HARRY Otter Café in Harajuku is small, with a basic fee of about ¥3,080 per person per hour; interactive time requires an additional ¥880 per person for 5 minutes. The otters have limited activity space, and overall ratings are around 2.5 to 3 stars. If you want longer, more intimate interaction, consider another place called カワウソ_若林の家.

958599363857.name: How can I buy Skyliner Keisei Electric Railway tickets more economically, and how does it differ from other transport from Narita Airport to central Tokyo?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Skyliner is the fastest way from Narita Airport to Ueno in Tokyo, taking about 41 minutes non-stop. It has no unreserved seats and requires seat reservations. It is recommended to buy round-trip tickets online via KKday for a cheaper price, around NT$912. The ticket consists of two parts, so be careful not to misunderstand when purchasing.

bea62c251f1b.name: How many days does it take for Rakuten Forwarding to ship products from Japan to Taiwan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rakuten Forwarding takes about 3 days from receiving the goods at the Japan forwarding station to shipping them to Taiwan, with very fast overall delivery speed. For example, when the author purchased a Horie titanium cup, it took only 2 days from the shipment request to receiving the product, and the fastest delivery can be within 4 days.

bea62c251f1b.name: What protections are provided when purchasing Rakuten Ichiba products using Rakuten Forwarding?

acceptedAnswer.text: Purchasing Rakuten Ichiba products through Rakuten Forwarding includes compensation services covering undelivered goods, damage, discrepancies from product descriptions, and counterfeit product compensation. The compensation limit is up to 300,000 yen, with no handling fees or annual fees. These protections make overseas shopping more secure.

bea62c251f1b.name: How is Rakuten Forwarding’s shipping fee calculated? How to estimate the shipping cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rakuten Forwarding calculates shipping fees based on the final package size and weight after consolidation, charging according to different delivery methods. The official website provides an online calculator where you can enter package dimensions and weight to estimate the price. Based on the author’s experience, a 2.3 kg package sent to Taiwan via EMS air freight costs about 6,550 yen, approximately NT$665 in shipping fees.

bea62c251f1b.name: How to complete Rakuten Forwarding account registration and real-name verification?

acceptedAnswer.text: First, register an account on the Rakuten official website by entering your email, password, and English name. Then log in to the Rakuten Forwarding page, switch to Traditional Chinese, and activate forwarding by verifying your email and filling in your Chinese name and katakana. Finally, upload your ID and complete facial recognition for real-name verification to use the forwarding service.

bea62c251f1b.name: What prohibited items should be noted when shipping to Taiwan via Rakuten Forwarding?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rakuten Forwarding prohibits shipping flammable materials, sprays, fresh food, and other items banned by Taiwanese regulations. Different shipping methods have different restrictions. For purchasing alcohol or tobacco, it is necessary to check related procedures in advance, usually requiring additional tax payment to clear customs, to avoid package return or confiscation.

bea62c251f1b.name: What packaging options are available when shipping back to Taiwan using Rakuten Forwarding?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rakuten Forwarding offers various packaging services such as removing original packaging boxes to reduce weight, waterproofing packages, and using reinforced boxes specially designed for international shipping to enhance protection. The author chose the reinforced box to ensure the product’s safe arrival and you can select packaging options based on whether you want to save on shipping costs or strengthen packaging.

bea62c251f1b.name: How to use Rakuten Forwarding to ship products purchased from Amazon Japan back to Taiwan?

acceptedAnswer.text: When shopping on Amazon Japan, enter the dedicated address and phone number provided by Rakuten Forwarding as the shipping address. After placing the order, it is recommended to register the shipment information in the Rakuten Forwarding system for easier management. Once the product arrives at the Rakuten Forwarding warehouse, wait for packaging and pay the shipping fee to send it back to Taiwan.

62f68ebeecd3.name: Why does iOS Timer pause when ScrollView is scrolling?

acceptedAnswer.text: iOS Timer is by default added to the RunLoop's .default Mode, which mainly handles UI display. However, during ScrollView scrolling or gesture operations, the RunLoop switches to .tracking Mode, causing the Timer to pause. To avoid this, you can add the Timer to the .common Mode, allowing it to run in both .default and .tracking Modes, ensuring it triggers normally even while scrolling.

62f68ebeecd3.name: How to prevent crashes caused by incorrect suspend and resume call order in DispatchSourceTimer?

acceptedAnswer.text: DispatchSourceTimer requires suspend() and resume() to be called in pairs; otherwise, it will crash immediately. You cannot call suspend() twice consecutively or resume() twice consecutively, nor can you call cancel() while suspended. Therefore, encapsulating DispatchSourceTimer's state transitions with a finite state machine to strictly control the operation order can prevent such crashes.

62f68ebeecd3.name: When should you use Timer and when should you use DispatchSourceTimer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Timer is suitable for UI-related needs, such as countdowns or carousel banners, because it integrates with the Main Thread RunLoop and is easy to use. DispatchSourceTimer is better for background tasks unrelated to UI, like sending tracking events or cleaning data periodically, as it offers higher precision and supports suspend/resume, but is more complex to use and requires manually switching back to the Main Thread for UI updates.

62f68ebeecd3.name: How to safely use DispatchSourceTimer to avoid crashes?

acceptedAnswer.text: To safely use DispatchSourceTimer, encapsulate its state and operations with a finite state machine to ensure activate, suspend, resume, and cancel are called in the correct order. Use a Serial Queue to synchronize state transitions and avoid race conditions. This way, even with multithreaded operations, it won't crash and can be safely released during deinit.

62f68ebeecd3.name: How to avoid Retain Cycle with iOS Timer?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Timer's execution block (closure) strongly retains self, which can easily cause a Retain Cycle. The solution is to use [weak self] in the closure capture list to ensure the Timer does not strongly retain the ViewController. Also, call timer.invalidate() in the ViewController's deinit to release the Timer and prevent memory leaks.

62f68ebeecd3.name: Why does DispatchSourceTimer require manually switching back to the Main Thread for UI updates?

acceptedAnswer.text: DispatchSourceTimer runs based on a GCD Queue and by default does not execute on the Main Thread. Therefore, all UI updates must be manually dispatched back to the Main Thread; otherwise, it may cause UI anomalies or crashes. This is an important difference when using DispatchSourceTimer and must be carefully handled.

62f68ebeecd3.name: How to use Design Patterns to make DispatchSourceTimer easier to test?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can use the Adapter Pattern to encapsulate DispatchSourceTimer by defining a TimerAdapter protocol to abstract operations, and use the Factory Pattern to create TimerAdapter instances. This allows you to replace the real Timer with mock objects during testing, making DispatchSourceTimerMachine easier to unit test.

7c0974856393.name: How does the App Store Connect API Webhook notification help me save waiting time costs in CI/CD?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Webhook instantly notifies you when a build version upload is complete, eliminating the need for polling. Previously, CI/CD would spend about 20 minutes polling the build status, wasting approximately $1.24 in cloud service waiting costs. The Webhook allows you to immediately start the submission process upon receiving the completion notification, achieving zero waiting cost.

7c0974856393.name: How do I configure the App Store Connect API Webhook to receive event notifications for a specific app?

acceptedAnswer.text: You must have Admin or Account Holder permissions. After logging into App Store Connect, go to the “Users and Access” section and then the “Integrations” page. Add a new Webhook by entering a name, Webhook URL, and secret string, select the app you want to monitor, check the event types you want to receive, and finally click Add to complete the setup.

7c0974856393.name: Can the App Store Connect API Webhook event data directly provide detailed version numbers and rejection reasons?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Webhook only sends the event type and status name; it does not include detailed version numbers or rejection reasons. To obtain complete information, you must use the Relationships Link in the event payload and send an HTTP request through the App Store Connect API to retrieve detailed data.

7c0974856393.name: How is the App Store Connect API Webhook notification verified to ensure data security?

acceptedAnswer.text: When creating a Webhook, a secret key is set. The receiver uses this key to perform an HMAC-SHA256 calculation on the Request Body and compares it with the x-apple-signature in the Request Header to ensure the notification is from Apple. Sample code for this verification is available for Node.js and Cloudflare Worker.

7c0974856393.name: Which CI/CD tools can the App Store Connect API Webhook integrate with to achieve automation?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Webhook can integrate with CI/CD services such as GitHub Actions, Bitbucket Pipeline, and GitLab Runner. Upon receiving an event, the Webhook endpoint can trigger the corresponding CI/CD action and use Fastlane Spaceship for API authentication to complete automated packaging, submission, notifications, and other processes.

7c0974856393.name: What are some common use cases of the App Store Connect API Webhook that can improve development efficiency?

acceptedAnswer.text: Common use cases include: automatically submitting for review after build completion to avoid waiting, aligning GitFlow branches with app release timing, automatically pushing release notifications to Slack, instant notifications on build failures or review rejections, and automatically forwarding TestFlight testing feedback. These significantly enhance team automation and responsiveness.

7c0974856393.name: Why can't Google Apps Script Web App be used to verify App Store Connect API Webhook notifications?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Apps Script Web App's doPost(e) cannot access HTTP Request Headers, so it cannot retrieve the x-apple-signature for HMAC verification. It can only use URL query parameters with a secret key for basic protection, but cannot perform complete security verification.

88f0fb935120.name: How to get the follower count of an account through Medium Private API using Graphql?

acceptedAnswer.text: By sending a POST request to https://medium.com/_/graphql, using the UserFollowers Graphql query, and including the target username in the payload, you can obtain the follower count. In the JSON response, the key field is data.userResult.socialStats.followerCount. For example, the follower count I retrieved was 1050. This method does not require an authorization token or cookies.

88f0fb935120.name: Why is the official Medium API not suitable for scraping article data?

acceptedAnswer.text: The official Medium API has been discontinued and is not recommended because it does not align with Medium's product strategy. Medium prefers content to remain on their site and discourages external integrations. The official API is limited and unstable, unable to fully retrieve article content, so it should not be relied upon for scraping data.

88f0fb935120.name: How to scrape article lists and content using Medium Private API?

acceptedAnswer.text: First, use the UserProfileQuery to get the account's article list by providing the user ID; the response will include article IDs. Then, use the PostViewerEdgeContentQuery to query specific article content by providing the article ID to get the article's paragraph JSON. By combining these two Graphql requests, you can scrape the complete article list and content.

88f0fb935120.name: After Medium upgraded Cloudflare protection, how to bypass 403 blocks?

acceptedAnswer.text: Direct requests from cloud services are blocked by Cloudflare, and sending sid and uid cookies no longer works. The solution is to deploy a Cloudflare Worker as a proxy bridge. The Worker forwards requests to the Medium Private API and, since it runs inside Cloudflare, it can bypass bot protection. This way, data can be successfully retrieved, and the Worker only needs to forward requests and responses.

88f0fb935120.name: How to test Medium Private API's Graphql requests using Postman?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Postman, create a new POST request with the URL set to https://medium.com/_/graphql. Choose raw body and set it to JSON, then paste the Graphql query payload. Set the Headers with Content-Type as application/json and simulate a browser User-Agent. After sending, Postman will return data in JSON format, making it easy to debug and analyze.

88f0fb935120.name: Will using sid and uid login tokens for Medium Private API remain valid long-term?

acceptedAnswer.text: Initially, sending sid and uid cookies could pass authentication, but after Medium's Cloudflare protection upgrade, this method no longer works. This means sid and uid may be invalidated or restricted and cannot be relied on long-term. It is recommended to use a Cloudflare Worker proxy approach, which is more stable and less likely to be blocked.

88f0fb935120.name: How to convert Medium Private API article content JSON into Markdown?

acceptedAnswer.text: The article content is described in JSON format with paragraphs and text styles. To convert it to Markdown, you need to parse the paragraphs and markups in the bodyModel. You can use the author's open-source tool ZMediumToMarkdown, which converts JSON format into Markdown, making it convenient for backup and reading.

823ac523ccc8.name: What roles do Certificates, Identifiers, Profiles, and Devices play in iOS development?

acceptedAnswer.text: Certificates are the identity used to sign the app, divided into Development, Distribution, and Enterprise types; Identifiers are the Bundle IDs for Apps or Extensions, managing features and services; Devices are registered physical devices, restricting Development and Ad Hoc testing; Profiles are provisioning profiles that combine Certificates, Identifiers, and Devices, categorized into Development, Ad Hoc, and App Store types. This strict control ensures that only legitimate certificates and devices can install the app.

823ac523ccc8.name: Why does Xcode show the "No signing certificate found" error and how to fix it?

acceptedAnswer.text: This error usually occurs because the corresponding iOS Development or Distribution Certificate is missing, or the certificate exists but the Private Key is not available. To fix this, delete old certificates and profiles from the Keychain, export the .p12 file from the original machine that created the certificate and install it, or regenerate and download new certificates and profiles from the Apple Developer portal.

823ac523ccc8.name: How does Fastlane Match help teams unify the management of iOS certificates and provisioning profiles?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fastlane Match interacts with the App Store Connect API to automatically generate and update certificates and provisioning profiles, encrypting them and storing them in a private Git repository. Team members and CI/CD services pull these certificates from the same source, avoiding certificate confusion and duplication. Match can also automatically fix expired certificates and supports role-based management, allowing developers read-only access while administrators handle updates.

823ac523ccc8.name: In CI/CD workflows, how to securely use Fastlane Match's Private Git Repo certificate store?

acceptedAnswer.text: CI/CD accesses the Private Git Repo using an SSH Deploy Key. First, generate a password-less SSH key locally, add the public key to the Match Repo's Deploy Keys, and store the private key in the CI/CD platform's Secrets. During execution, write the private key to a file and set proper permissions. This allows CI/CD to securely pull the encrypted certificates without using personal account SSH keys.

823ac523ccc8.name: How to prevent Fastlane Match from prompting for a passphrase and interrupting the CI/CD process?

acceptedAnswer.text: Add the Match Repo passphrase to the CI/CD platform's Secrets, then pass it to Fastlane via the MATCH_PASSWORD environment variable during execution. This lets Fastlane automatically decrypt the certificates without prompting for input, ensuring the automation process runs uninterrupted while keeping certificates secure and up-to-date.

823ac523ccc8.name: How to handle the Keychain on a Self-hosted Runner to avoid Fastlane Match certificate conflicts?

acceptedAnswer.text: On a Self-hosted Runner, it is recommended to create a clean Keychain before each run and specify the keychain_name and keychain_password in Fastlane's match command. Certificates will be installed into this Keychain. After the job completes, delete the Keychain to prevent leftover certificates from causing conflicts. This ensures the Runner environment stays clean and certificate management is correct.

823ac523ccc8.name: What errors occur if a Provisioning Profile does not include the specified device or Bundle ID, and how to fix them?

acceptedAnswer.text: If the Provisioning Profile does not include the specified device UDID, the error "Provisioning profile doesn’t include the currently selected device" will appear; if it does not include the correct Bundle ID, the error "Provisioning profile doesn’t match the bundle identifier" will show. To fix this, ensure the device is registered in the Apple Developer portal Devices section, the Bundle ID is registered, then regenerate and download the corresponding Profile.

055527a739dd.name: What is the most convenient bus to take from Sapporo, Hokkaido to Jozankei Onsen?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most convenient bus from Sapporo Station to Jozankei Onsen is the reservation-only Kappa Liner, with a travel time of about 60 minutes. It operates only in autumn and winter, has frequent direct service to Jozankei Onsen, and requires booking and activating an e-ticket online via the official website before boarding. Show the ticket to the driver when boarding. This route is smoother compared to other non-reservation routes that take longer.

055527a739dd.name: How is the accommodation environment at Jozankei Yurakusoan Hotel in Jozankei Onsen, Hokkaido?

acceptedAnswer.text: Jozankei Yurakusoan is a traditional Japanese wooden hot spring inn with large rooms that include private toilets, private baths, and living rooms. The hotel is well maintained without any musty or dirty smells, and offers multiple public private baths for use. It is located at the entrance of the Jozankei Onsen street, in a quiet environment, ideal for travelers who enjoy an authentic Japanese hot spring experience.

055527a739dd.name: What attractions are included in the KKday Hokkaido Illumination One-Day Tour?

acceptedAnswer.text: The KKday Hokkaido Illumination One-Day Tour includes daytime visits to Furano Forest Elf Terrace, Christmas Tree, and Shirahige Falls, and an evening illumination at Biei Blue Pond. The tour departs from Sapporo Odori Subway Station, with a travel time of about 2 hours and 30 minutes, including stops at rest areas. It is a small group tour for convenience and speed, priced at approximately NT$1,807.

055527a739dd.name: What special activities are worth joining at Otaru Aquarium in Hokkaido?

acceptedAnswer.text: Otaru Aquarium features outdoor harbor enclosures, with a winter penguin parade, as well as seal, sea lion, and walrus shows. The penguin parade route is complete and includes walking to the penguin pool for a swim. Visitors can feed seals and sea lions with fish, but feeding is limited and some pools prohibit feeding. Overall, the performances are rich and provide a great experience, suitable for ocean animal enthusiasts.

055527a739dd.name: Which hotel in Sapporo city is more convenient for shopping and transportation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Staying at Keio Prelia Hotel Sapporo is convenient as it is near the back exit of Sapporo Station, about a 5-minute walk. The hotel is modern with complete facilities and spacious non-smoking rooms. However, the area around the back exit is quieter with fewer drugstores; for a livelier shopping area, it is recommended to stay near Odori Station.

055527a739dd.name: What is the most convenient transportation from New Chitose Airport to Sapporo city?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most convenient way from New Chitose Airport to Sapporo city is by JR Rapid Airport train, which takes about 33 to 41 minutes. This service runs frequently with 163 trips daily. You can use IC cards like Kitaca, Suica, or PASMO to enter directly without queuing for tickets, making it fast and convenient.

055527a739dd.name: Which type of eSIM is more suitable for traveling in Hokkaido?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is recommended to purchase a Japan 5G unlimited data eSIM supporting ChatGPT and Gemini from KKday, costing about NT$343 for 6 days. It offers unlimited data with stable signals in most areas (though there may be no signal in remote mountain areas like Biei). Activation requires an internet connection, so it is advised to activate it before boarding the plane at the airport in Taiwan.

6bf79c5b4dab.name: How can I use Claude Design to redesign the page style of my Jekyll Blog?

acceptedAnswer.text: First, save your existing Blog pages as static files and organize them into a Theme directory, then upload it to Claude Design and select "Attach codebase." Next, enter your design requirements as a prompt. Claude Design will generate multiple visual variants and create a complete Design System (CSS + React.js/HTML) in about 3–5 minutes. You can instantly adjust fonts, layout width, and color schemes using the Tweaks panel.

6bf79c5b4dab.name: How does Claude Code apply Claude Design's design drafts to my Jekyll Blog?

acceptedAnswer.text: First, run /init in your Jekyll Blog directory so Claude Code understands the structure. Then place the design files downloaded from Claude Design into the project, and ask Claude Code to implement the theme based on these designs. This process consumes about 20K Tokens. After completion, run bundle exec jekyll serve to preview locally.

6bf79c5b4dab.name: What tasks are Claude Design and Claude Code each suitable for?

acceptedAnswer.text: Claude Design focuses on visual design and producing a complete Design System, suitable for designing page styles and UI components. Claude Code is responsible for implementing functionality and frontend code based on the design drafts, turning designs into usable Jekyll themes. It is recommended to use Claude Design for visual adjustments and Claude Code for functional implementation.

6bf79c5b4dab.name: How much time and cost does it generally take to build a custom Blog using Claude Design + Claude Code?

acceptedAnswer.text: The entire process takes about a weekend afternoon. Claude Design’s design time is within 2 hours, and Claude Code’s implementation uses part of a 5-hour quota, costing around 100 USD. Both the server and Jekyll Theme are free, resulting in low overall cost and high efficiency.

6bf79c5b4dab.name: Why should I replace my 5-year-old Chirpy Theme with Claude Design + Claude Code?

acceptedAnswer.text: Although the Chirpy Theme is feature-rich, its interface design is somewhat basic and hard to fully match personal preferences. Using Claude Design + Claude Code allows you to customize a unique style and functionality, quickly realizing your ideal Blog look, avoiding repeated searching or compromises, and enhancing your personal brand quality.

6bf79c5b4dab.name: When deploying a Jekyll Blog to GitHub Pages, what should I tell the AI to watch out for?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can tell the AI that your Blog will be deployed to GitHub Pages, which only allows certain Jekyll Plugins; plugins not on the allowed list won’t work after deployment. You can also ask the AI to prioritize using native Jekyll features and free open-source plugins, and to focus on SEO structure and responsive web design (RWD) experience to ensure smooth deployment and good site performance.

6bf79c5b4dab.name: If I want to adjust the new page design of my Blog, which is more suitable: Claude Design or Claude Code?

acceptedAnswer.text: For adjusting new page designs, you should go back to Claude Design to modify the design drafts, then re-download and place them back into the project directory. Claude Code is not good at visual aesthetics and mainly handles functional implementation, so it is not recommended to use Claude Code directly for visual adjustments.

35cc65327d28.name: What is the maximum execution time limit for Google Apps Script? Does it affect large tasks?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Apps Script can run for a maximum of 6 minutes per execution, and there is also a daily trigger time limit (for example, triggers can run up to 90 minutes per day). These limits affect large or long-running tasks, so it is recommended to split tasks into smaller segments or use scheduled triggers.

35cc65327d28.name: How can I seamlessly connect Google Apps Script to Google services without writing my own OAuth flow?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Apps Script has built-in integrations for many Google services, such as SpreadsheetApp, GmailApp, CalendarApp, etc. The Web App access permissions can be set to the script owner or users within the organization, so you don't need to implement OAuth yourself. With one-click setup, you can easily use Google services. This makes connecting to Google services very simple and fast.

35cc65327d28.name: What technical limitations of Google Apps Script affect API integration?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Apps Script cannot customize the User-Agent header; if an API blocks the Google Apps Script User-Agent, it cannot be used. Each execution is synchronous and blocking with no multithreading, so tasks need to be split. Web App APIs automatically redirect, which some HTTP clients do not support and will fail. Cold starts cause delays on the first call. These limitations impact certain API integration scenarios.

35cc65327d28.name: How to use an AI Agent to assist in developing Google Apps Script projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: First, create a project and manage code using the clasp tool. Then provide the AI Agent (such as Claude Code) with project background and design requirements, and the AI can write GAS code from scratch. Manual OAuth authorization and necessary settings like API keys and Sheet IDs are required during the process. The AI will automatically advance development, deployment, and testing.

35cc65327d28.name: What workflow automation scenarios is Google Apps Script suitable for?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Apps Script is suitable for personal or team workflow integration and automation, such as automatically querying Google Analytics traffic and sending Slack notifications, regularly compiling operational data into Google Sheets, or triggering GitHub Actions. It is free and seamlessly connects to Google services, ideal for small to medium-sized tasks that do not require long-running computations.

35cc65327d28.name: Why can't Google Apps Script Web Apps achieve full-screen PWA with hidden address bar?

acceptedAnswer.text: GAS Web App pages are embedded inside an iframe within Google's framework, with an anti-abuse notice at the top and no customizable URL. Therefore, true responsive design (RWD) or full-screen PWA with a hidden address bar cannot be achieved. For a complete experience, you can use the GAS Web App as a backend API and deploy an independent frontend page via GitHub Pages.

35cc65327d28.name: How to manage Google Apps Script project code using the clasp tool?

acceptedAnswer.text: First, install Node.js (version 20 or above) and the clasp CLI. Run clasp login to sign in to your Google account, then create a project in your directory using clasp create. Clasp supports local editing, version control, and CI/CD integration, helping to avoid Web Editor crashes or code overwrites.

35cc65327d28.name: What are the differences between Google Apps Script and other FAAS services like Cloud Function?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Apps Script is a free FAAS tool centered around Google services, offering seamless integration without complicated OAuth, but with execution time and resource limits. Other FAAS services like Cloud Function are paid with more flexible resources, require formal IAM/OAuth setup to connect to Google services, and have more complex development.

0d4a5fd2929b.name: What are the keypress force and lifespan specifications of the IQUNIX MG75 Pro's Light Feather switches?

acceptedAnswer.text: The IQUNIX MG75 Pro uses custom Light Feather switches (Gold Red Switch) with a keypress force of about 40 ± 10 Ggf, a total travel distance of 2.8 mm ± 0.25, an actuation point at approximately 1.2 mm ± 0.30, and a lifespan of up to 50 million keystrokes. This design provides a light and durable key feel, suitable for long-term use.

0d4a5fd2929b.name: What connection methods and operating systems does the IQUNIX MG75 Pro support?

acceptedAnswer.text: The IQUNIX MG75 Pro supports three connection modes: wired (Type-C), Bluetooth 5.1, and 2.4 GHz wireless. It is compatible with Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android systems. This tri-mode design allows easy switching between multiple devices, and the keyboard comes with macOS keycaps, enabling direct shortcut mapping for Mac users.

0d4a5fd2929b.name: What are the main differences between the IQUNIX MG75 Pro and MG75?

acceptedAnswer.text: Compared to the MG75, the MG75 Pro adds a multimedia control panel on the right side (with 5 extra keys) and is heavier (MG75 weighs about 947g, MG75 Pro about 1110g). Both have a 4,000mAh battery capacity. The multimedia control panel offers additional shortcut functions, with a price difference of about RMB 100, making it more practical for users who need media controls.

0d4a5fd2929b.name: What are the features of the IQUNIX MG75 Pro's keycap material and casing?

acceptedAnswer.text: The keycaps are made of high-content PBT material with an anti-stain coating, giving the surface a skin-like texture that is comfortable and durable. The casing is CNC-machined full aluminum alloy, with keyboard height ranging from 11 mm (low end) to 25.5 mm (high end). The overall build feels solid with a metallic sheen, enhancing the premium feel and durability during use.

0d4a5fd2929b.name: What is the most cost-effective way to purchase the IQUNIX MG75 Pro in Taiwan?

acceptedAnswer.text: There is no local distributor in Taiwan, so purchasing through the official IQUNIX flagship store on Taobao is the most cost-effective option. The MG75 Pro costs about TWD 4,798 including shipping and tax. The overseas official website price plus shipping is around TWD 6,200, so buying directly from Taobao saves about TWD 1,400. Taobao also offers convenient payment options like JKoPay and Apple Pay.

0d4a5fd2929b.name: How do the key sound and feel of the IQUNIX MG75 Pro perform?

acceptedAnswer.text: The key sound is much quieter than typical mechanical keyboards but still provides noticeable tactile feedback, suitable for those who want a tactile feel without loud noise. In actual use, the keys feel light and comfortable, with a deep and non-piercing sound. A downside is that the keys on the right side are densely packed, which can lead to accidental presses of the Delete and Home keys.

0d4a5fd2929b.name: How to switch the IQUNIX MG75 Pro to macOS key layout?

acceptedAnswer.text: After powering on the keyboard, press and hold FN + ESC for more than 3 seconds to boot, then press FN + Tab to switch to the macOS key layout. This step is important; otherwise, the CMD key will function as CTRL, which affects the Mac user experience.

f7bec8f79c08.name: How does Rangeable<Element> handle overlapping and merging of multiple intervals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rangeable<Element> automatically merges overlapping or adjacent intervals of the same element, maintaining sorted and non-overlapping intervals. It converts multiple (element, start, end) entries into a merged set of closed intervals, enabling fast queries of which elements are active at a given position. For example, inserting STRONG[2,5] and STRONG[3,7] will ultimately merge into STRONG[2,7], avoiding duplicate intervals.

f7bec8f79c08.name: Why is the interval end in Rangeable designed as inclusive (closed interval)?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rangeable chooses an inclusive interval end because it aligns with Medium markup’s historical data model and matches human intuition for determining if a character is active. Closed intervals facilitate merging of adjacent integers, such as [2,4] and [5,7] merging into [2,7], and single-point intervals like [5,5] are valid to represent a specific position.

f7bec8f79c08.name: How does Rangeable ensure efficient queries for active elements at a given index?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rangeable uses per-element sorted, non-overlapping interval lists combined with a lazy boundary-event index. Querying active elements at an index has a complexity of O(log M + r), where M is the number of merged intervals and r is the number of active elements at that position. This structure is well-suited for workloads with many insertions followed by intensive queries.

f7bec8f79c08.name: Why doesn’t Rangeable use Interval Tree or Segment Tree for implementation?

acceptedAnswer.text: The RFC chooses per-element sorted disjoint lists plus a lazy event index because this naturally merges intervals of the same element, maintains deterministic cross-language consistency, and fits a build-once-then-query pattern. While Interval Trees have advantages, they do not easily guarantee consistent behavior across languages or maintain insertion order sorting.

f7bec8f79c08.name: What is the element sorting criterion in Rangeable?

acceptedAnswer.text: Elements are sorted based on the order they are first inserted, not by hash or alphabetical order. This ensures consistent results across languages and aligns with Markdown style nesting rules: elements inserted earlier appear first. For example, if Strong is inserted before Italic, the query order will be [Strong, Italic].

f7bec8f79c08.name: How does the transitions(over:) method in Rangeable work?

acceptedAnswer.text: transitions(over:) returns open and close events of elements within a specified interval. Close events occur at the closed interval’s high endpoint plus one, facilitating sweep-line processing. Event sorting rules prioritize open events before close events at the same coordinate; multiple open events are sorted ascending by insertion order, while close events are sorted descending, ensuring correct Markdown style nesting.

f7bec8f79c08.name: What features are not supported in Rangeable v1?

acceptedAnswer.text: v1 does not include interval removal, clearing, interval operations (union/intersect/difference), immutable snapshots, floating-point coordinates, multi-dimensional rectangle queries, or interval range queries. These complex operations are planned for implementation in RFC v2.

f7bec8f79c08.name: How is Rangeable applied in rendering Markdown styles in Medium articles?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medium article markups often involve multiple overlapping and interleaved intervals. Rangeable abstracts these as elements with closed interval sets, enabling fast queries of which styles are active on each character. This replaces the original brute-force per-character checking approach, improving performance by about 2.23 times. For example, characters with both STRONG and EM styles can be rendered correctly and efficiently.

sanin.name: What is the best way to plan a trip to Sanyo and Sanin, and why visit both together?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sanyo is on the Seto Inland Sea side, with dense transportation and many cities, while Sanin is on the Sea of Japan side, with scattered attractions and fewer services. The advantage of visiting both together is to first use the Sanyo Shinkansen to build a transportation backbone, then extend to Sanin by cross-mountain limited express or bus, improving time efficiency. This way, you can experience the different scenery and culture on both sides.

sanin.name: When departing from Taiwan, is it better to enter through Okayama Airport or Hiroshima Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: Okayama Airport is small and has quick customs clearance, suitable for entering directly through Okayama, then visiting Hiroshima and Kurashiki, and finally connecting to Sanin, which allows for a smoother itinerary. Hiroshima Airport is farther from the city center, and flight schedules may not be ideal. If you want to explore both Sanyo and Sanin, Okayama is more convenient for entry and exit.

sanin.name: How to arrange a half-day to full-day trip to Miyajima most smoothly?

acceptedAnswer.text: Take the JR or tram from Hiroshima to Miyajimaguchi, then transfer to the ferry to the island. The recommended itinerary is to first explore the port shopping street for supplies, then visit the Itsukushima Shrine's floating corridor, take the cable car up to the Shishiiwa Observatory, and finally stroll back slowly while enjoying oyster dishes. Remember to check the tide schedule to plan for high or low tide to capture different views.

sanin.name: Any suggestions for visiting Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is recommended to allocate a half-day when you are mentally stable and not rushed. The Peace Memorial Museum contains a lot of information and can be emotionally heavy. After visiting, you can take a riverside walk or rest at a café. Please respect the atmosphere on site by keeping your voice low and avoid exaggerated poses in front of memorial facilities.

sanin.name: What are some recommended attractions and itineraries in Okayama?

acceptedAnswer.text: Okayama is suitable as a transportation hub and cultural finale. Recommended attractions include Korakuen Garden (a famous Japanese garden), Okayama Castle (known as Crow Castle with night views), Kurashiki Bikan Historical Quarter (white-walled warehouses and canal old streets), and Kibitsu Shrine (associated with Momotaro folklore). Plan for 1 to 2 days and consider purchasing a rail pass to speed up sightseeing.

sanin.name: How to arrange transportation and itinerary efficiently when connecting from Sanyo to Sanin?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is recommended to first explore Hiroshima and Okayama in Sanyo, using the Shinkansen and dense city routes to maximize travel efficiency, then take a cross-mountain limited express or highway bus north from Okayama to connect to Sanin. This route is natural with more frequent services, making it convenient to visit Shimane, Tottori, and other attractions.

sanin.name: Is it worth buying a JR PASS for Sanyo and Sanin travel? How to decide?

acceptedAnswer.text: Decide by adding up the cost of essential long-distance transportation. If the round-trip cost approaches the ticket price, it is worth it. It becomes even more cost-effective if you add spontaneous visits to places like Kure or Onomichi. Common passes include the Okayama-Hiroshima-Yamaguchi Area Pass, Sanyo-Sanin Area Pass, and Setouchi Area Pass; choose the one that best fits your itinerary.

sanin.name: What is the most comfortable season to travel in Sanyo and Sanin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Spring (March-April) features cherry blossoms and comfortable weather but accommodations are more expensive and require early booking; autumn (October-November) offers beautiful fall foliage and dry weather, ideal for walking tours; summer (July-September) showcases the scenic Seto Inland Sea but is hot and humid, so sun protection and hydration are necessary; winter (December-February) has fewer tourists and light-up events but is cold with sea breezes, especially around port areas.

atami.name: What is the easiest way to get from Tokyo to the Atami Summer Fireworks Festival by train?

acceptedAnswer.text: Taking the Shinkansen from Tokyo is the easiest option, reaching Atami in about 45 minutes. It is recommended to purchase your return ticket in advance and allow a 20–30 minute buffer to handle the crowd after the event. After getting off, walk through the shopping street in front of the station and then walk about 15–25 minutes to reach the beach.

atami.name: Where are the recommended free viewing spots for the Atami Summer Fireworks Festival?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most recommended free viewing spot is Atami Sun Beach, which offers a wide open view, comfortable seating, and great angles for photos. It’s best to arrive between 5:30 PM and 6:30 PM to secure a spot, and even earlier on busy weekend nights. If you want to leave quickly after the show, choose a spot slightly further back toward the Higashi Kaigancho area.

atami.name: What should I be aware of when returning to Tokyo Station from the Atami Fireworks Festival?

acceptedAnswer.text: Atami Station gets very crowded after the event, so it’s advisable to buy your return ticket and top up your IC card in advance to avoid queues. It takes about 20–25 minutes to walk back to the station after the event. The return period between 9:00 PM and 10:00 PM is the most crowded, so consider traveling earlier or later, or take the train from Kinomiya Station to help disperse the crowd.

atami.name: What is the most efficient way to arrange meals on the day of the Atami Summer Fireworks Festival?

acceptedAnswer.text: Popular restaurants tend to be full and have long lines on fireworks day. The most efficient strategy is to buy drinks and food in advance at the shopping street in front of the station or convenience stores, then have a picnic on the beach. This avoids rushing before the show and allows you to enjoy the fireworks more comfortably.

atami.name: Is it better to stay overnight on the day of the Atami Fireworks Festival?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you want a comfortable experience, enjoy hot springs, and fully experience Atami, staying overnight is recommended. This way, you don’t have to squeeze through crowds at the station and can leisurely walk back to your hotel to relax in the hot springs. If you are already staying in Tokyo and only want to see the fireworks, a same-day round trip is possible but requires careful planning of return tickets and timing.

atami.name: What nearby attractions are suitable for a daytime day trip during the Atami Fireworks Festival?

acceptedAnswer.text: Atami is great for sightseeing during the day. Recommended spots include Atami Sun Beach, Atami Station shopping street, MOA Museum of Art, Kinomiya Shrine, Atami Plum Garden, Kiunkaku, and ACAO FOREST. If you want to visit two areas, you can add Hakone, which offers attractions like Lake Ashi, pirate ships, and cable cars, with convenient transportation and a rich itinerary.

atami.name: What gear should I bring when watching the fireworks at the Atami Fireworks Festival?

acceptedAnswer.text: It’s recommended to bring a picnic mat or plastic sheet to sit comfortably on the beach; also bring drinks and snacks since it’s difficult to get food and drinks on site quickly. You may also want to bring insect repellent, a light jacket, and a mobile phone power bank to improve comfort and convenience.

cdc.name: What documents and fees are required to apply for a Citizen Digital Certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: To apply for a Citizen Digital Certificate, you must be at least 18 years old, have household registration, and apply in person with your original ID card. The processing fee is 250 NTD in cash. Binding the mobile Citizen Digital Certificate to a phone requires a 30 NTD handling fee, and a card reader must be purchased separately. It is also recommended to prepare an email address and mobile phone number to receive notifications.

cdc.name: What is the difference between the PIN code and the user code for the Citizen Digital Certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: The PIN code is the unlock password used when operating the card, commonly preset as the last 4 digits of the ID card plus the birth month and day, and it is recommended to change it immediately after applying. The user code is used to unlock or deactivate the certificate; it is not recorded by the system and must be kept securely by the user. Forgetting the user code may require in-person handling at an office.

cdc.name: How to verify the Citizen Digital Certificate using a phone's NFC function?

acceptedAnswer.text: Using NFC to verify the Citizen Digital Certificate on a phone requires three conditions: the phone must support NFC, the service app or website must support NFC card reading, and the card version must support NFC. When sensing, iPhones need to place the card near the back camera and move it slowly; the position on Android phones varies by brand. The card should be placed flat and held long enough to avoid quick scanning.

cdc.name: What is the difference between the mobile Citizen Digital Certificate and the physical Citizen Digital Certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: The physical Citizen Digital Certificate is a card containing an IC chip, which requires a card reader or phone NFC to use. The mobile Citizen Digital Certificate is an app version, with the certificate bound to the phone and verified via biometric authentication, requiring no card reader or card insertion. The mobile version limits one certificate per device and requires periodic key updates.

cdc.name: What are common use cases for the Citizen Digital Certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Citizen Digital Certificate is mainly used for government public services such as online tax filing, MyData data authorization, household registration applications, and logging into various government portals. In financial scenarios, it is used to increase transfer limits, set designated accounts, and sign contracts online. The medical insurance system also uses the certificate for identity verification and digital signatures.

cdc.name: What should I do if I forget the PIN code or enter it incorrectly multiple times?

acceptedAnswer.text: Forgetting the PIN code or entering it incorrectly multiple times will lock the card, so it is advised not to try randomly. The official process provides unlocking and resetting procedures, usually requiring the user code or in-person handling. It is best to handle this through official MOICA channels to avoid permanent card lockout.

cdc.name: What is the validity period of the Citizen Digital Certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: The physical Citizen Digital Certificate typically has a validity period of 5 years, but the exact duration is based on the card label or official announcements. The mobile Citizen Digital Certificate has a security usage period, such as a maximum of 8 years, after which renewal must be done in person.

cdc.name: What should I do if I lose my Citizen Digital Certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you lose your Citizen Digital Certificate, you should first apply to deactivate or revoke it to prevent misuse. After deactivation, go to the household registration office to apply for a replacement. This helps protect your personal identity security and digital signature rights.

appjobstw.name: What time are iOS/Android/Flutter job notifications pushed to Telegram daily?

acceptedAnswer.text: Job notifications are pushed to Telegram punctually between 00:00 and 01:00 every day, with slight time differences depending on the channel. This timing allows you to quickly grasp the latest job openings as soon as you wake up in the morning. Messages are retained for 30 days for easy review.

appjobstw.name: How does the Telegram job notification filter iOS, Android, and Flutter job openings?

acceptedAnswer.text: The system filters job openings that are newly added or updated on the day, and the job category must be iOS, Android, or Flutter engineer, or the job content must include these keywords. This ensures that the pushed jobs are all related to mobile development, making it easy for you to quickly find jobs that meet your criteria.

appjobstw.name: Why are job notifications only retained for 30 days?

acceptedAnswer.text: Messages are only kept for 30 days to avoid interference from outdated job openings, keeping notifications fresh and useful, while also protecting company job information from excessive exposure. This way, the jobs you see are all recent and valid opportunities.

appjobstw.name: How to quickly target high-paying or new job openings using Telegram job notifications?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notifications are sorted by job recency, salary level, and keywords. It is recommended to prioritize viewing the highest-paying jobs and those marked with 🆕 that are new within the last 90 days. This helps you grasp well-paid and fresh job opportunities first, increasing your chances of successful applications.

appjobstw.name: Which job platforms' openings are integrated and pushed to this Telegram channel?

acceptedAnswer.text: It integrates iOS, Android, and Flutter job openings from five major platforms: 104 Job Bank, 1111 Job Bank, CakeResume, LinkedIn Jobs, and Yourator. This allows you to access the latest job openings all at once without having to visit multiple websites separately.

appjobstw.name: How to manage and track applied jobs on Telegram?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can use Telegram’s “Save Message” or “Forward to Personal Notes” features to bookmark preferred job openings, and mark them with a ✅ after applying to avoid duplicate applications. This makes it convenient to follow up on replies and manage your application progress.

appjobstw.name: Who is the Telegram job notification suitable for?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is suitable for mobile developers focusing on iOS, Android, or Flutter, especially those who want to save time by not manually checking multiple job sites daily, and who prefer cross-platform integrated, clearly sorted, and mobile-friendly job notifications.

tax.name: What is the deadline for online tax filing in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: The deadline for filing the 2026 comprehensive income tax is from May 1st to June 1st. The original deadline was May 31st, but it was extended by one day because it fell on a Sunday. It is recommended to complete the filing three days in advance to avoid system congestion.

tax.name: What is the difference between the Citizen Digital Certificate and the Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate for tax filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Citizen Digital Certificate is a physical chip card used with a card reader, with a fee of 250 NTD, suitable for those who have a card reader at home and want to handle all services entirely online. The Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate is bound to a mobile app, with a binding fee of 30 NTD, requires no card reader, and uses biometric authentication, convenient for cardless environments. Both can be used for tax filing, but the physical card supports a wider range of bank designated accounts.

tax.name: How to complete online tax filing quickly without a card reader or physical card?

acceptedAnswer.text: The fastest way is to use mobile phone authentication. As long as you have a monthly subscription mobile number in your name, your ID number, and your National Health Insurance card number, and you turn off Wi-Fi and enable mobile data, you can complete the filing in about 5 minutes. This method does not require a card reader or certificate card.

tax.name: What should I do if I forget the PIN code of my Citizen Digital Certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you forget your PIN, do not try randomly to avoid locking the card. You should use the official MOICA unlocking or reset process. In some cases, you may need a user code or to handle it in person at a service counter. It is recommended to change the default PIN immediately after receiving the card to prevent guessing.

tax.name: How much tax does a single employee earning 1 million and 1.8 million NTD approximately pay?

acceptedAnswer.text: A single employee earning 1 million NTD, after deducting exemptions, standard deductions, and special salary deductions, has a taxable amount of about 27,700 NTD (applying a 5% tax rate). For an annual salary of 1.8 million NTD, the taxable amount is about 123,100 NTD (applying a 20% tax rate, after deducting the progressive difference).

tax.name: What is the application process for the Citizen Digital Certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: The application process has three steps: first, fill out the application form online (the data is retained for 7 days and you must visit in person within that period); second, bring your ID to any household registration office to verify identity, pay the fee, and set the password; finally, collect the card and complete activation and security settings.

tax.name: When will the tax refund be credited? How to check the refund status?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tax refunds are credited in three batches: the first batch on July 31st (for those who completed filing before June 1st and meet the qualifications), the second batch on October 31st, and the third batch on January 20th. You can check the refund status by entering your ID number on the Ministry of Finance Tax Portal.

tax.name: How to choose between Citizen Digital Certificate, National Health Insurance card, or mobile phone authentication when filing taxes?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you want to fully download income data and support subsequent banking and financial services, choose the Citizen Digital Certificate or Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate; if you don’t have a card reader and want to file quickly, choose mobile phone authentication; if you have a card reader at home and your National Health Insurance card is registered, you can also use the NHI card for tax filing. If you prefer not to file online at all, you can use user number plus inquiry code.
